name: myusic
description: MYusic web console, collector, and Navidrome runtime.

scripts.build:services: pnpm --filter @myusic/shared build && pnpm --filter @myusic/downloader build && pnpm --filter @myusic/api build && pnpm --filter @myusic/runtime build
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @myusic/shared build && pnpm --filter @myusic/downloader build && pnpm --filter @myusic/api build && pnpm --filter @myusic/runtime build && pnpm --filter @myusic/web build
